programmes.show_description: Discover how Hunkydory transforms ideas into beautiful projects, with exciting new products and inventive inspiration at every step.
Take inspiration from Add Some Sparkle, featuring demonstrations, tips and ideas to help you create with confidence and style.
Don't miss HobbyMaker Deals - an hour of special, limited-time offers on your favourite craft supplies, products, and more.
Take a creative journey with Crafter's Companion, featuring demonstrations, tips and ideas to help you create with confidence and style.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
William Morris Homewares bring timeless design into everyday living, with beautifully crafted pieces inspired by iconic heritage patterns.
Alistair MacDonald will be bringing us brand new Velvets & Lining Fabrics. With New Bias Bindings in the hour as well.
Join us and Rebecca Alexander-Frost for her brand new bag designs, Smithfield Bag and Balfour Wash bag.
Alistair MacDonald will be back with the brand new Bubble Crepe fabrics with brand new How to Patterns.
Grab it while you can... 20% off R.J.A.F Makes!
Join us for an hour ultimate crafting with the Ultimate Pro
Hayley & Jimmy have been inspiring and delighting since 2010 - offering affordable products to get everyone crafting. Tune in to see what's new!
Based in the UK, AALL & Create is your one stop shop for mixed media inspiration and essentials.
Established in 2011, IndigoBlu is a proudly independent craft company, known for its handmade stamps and other popular products. Join us to find out more!

Die cutting is a dream with the Gemini II! Join us for a special show full of hints, tips and die cutting.

...Collection: Beautiful monochromatic designs by American fabric designer Seth Apter for Free Spirit.
Mark Vardy joins us on Sewing Street with an hour of Silvar Design products.
Tracey Perks is back on Sewing Street with three brand new patterns - Jam Quilt, Checkmate Quilt and Love Table Runner.

Join us for deals on these popular Elna machines!
Ciao Bella is an Italian-based company producing beautiful paper collections for decoration and mixed media projects. Often selling out quickly - join us to see what's new.
Art Inspirations bring you designs from all over the world, with each artist's work manufactured into stamp sets, stencils, moulds and fabric panels for all crafters to enjoy!
From a humble needlecraft shop in 1990 to one of the UK's leading papercraft manufacturers, Hunkydory provides quality and quantity for new and established crafters alike.
Spellbinders have been providing tools, inspiration, and creative support for many years, working alongside some of the best designers in the business. Tune in to find out more!

Claina is back following her first sell out show on Hobbymaker. Watch as she brings card and paper to life with light, cutting and a little bit of magic!
